source_headline: Last Hit in Lightning Operations was Made in Bitlis City; 3 Terrorists Defeated; Orange Category Terrorist Disarmed
where_description:
Bitlis - Sehi Forests  
The blood of our martyrs did not remain on the ground.
 
It was determined that one of the terrorists who were neutralized in Bitlis was in the orange category.

Within the scope of the Yıldırım operations, 3 terrorists were neutralized in the operation carried out by the Provincial Gendarmerie Command on January 10-11, 2021, with the support of the Gendarmerie SİHA and UAV and the Air Force, with the Gendarmerie Special Operations and commando units in the countryside of Bitlis City Forests .

Sehi Forests are: http://www.gazetevatan.com/sehi-ormanlari-nerede-bitlis-sehi-ormanlari-hangi-ilcede-bitlis-1358626-gundem/ It seems it is 11 kilometers to the Bitlis town
